footer.summary: Member applications, certificates, courses, publications, internships, and Rule of Law broadcasts.

member.title: Member Login
member.help: For students, lawyers, and project members.

organizer.title: Organizer Login
organizer.help: For organizers who moderate comments and support project activity.

admin.title: Admin Login
admin.help: For main project administrators and leadership accounts.

hero.title: Generation Justice
hero.lead: A central membership site for students and young professionals who want to study the Rule of Law, publish legal writing, join discussions, attend live lessons, and volunteer for country projects.
hero.imageAlt: British Legal Centre homepage training banner

carousel.title: Justice, education, and cooperation in action.

education.title: Legal learning made clear and practical.

ruleOfLaw.alt: Legal documents and a pen on a desk
ruleOfLaw.title: Rules that protect rights and guide power.

cooperation.alt: International team collaborating around a table
cooperation.title: Young leaders working across borders.

humanRights.alt: Law library shelves representing human rights study
humanRights.title: Dignity, voice, and protection for every person.

how.title: Apply first, then enter the member hub.

apply.title: Submit the membership form
apply.body: Applicants provide name, address, email, country, phone number, and project interests.

certificate.title: Receive a certificate
certificate.body: The site automatically creates a registration number and printable membership certificate.

access.title: Access member services
access.body: Courses, discussions, competitions, broadcasts, internships, publications, and panels are behind login.

page.title: A prepared giving experience, ready for payments later.
page.lead: The public payment flow is intentionally disabled for now, but the frontend and backend are structured for Stripe integration.

readiness.title: Prepared for
readiness.tiers: Bronze, Silver, Gold, and Platinum tiers

widget.title: Support options are ready for a future Stripe checkout.
widget.body: This placeholder keeps the donation experience designed and structured while payments remain disabled.

donate.note: Payments are not active yet. This form is ready for a future Stripe Checkout session.

status.prepared: Donation preview prepared. Payments are not active yet.
